7 // -*- C++ -*-
8 #ifndef ARCGEOSIM_UTILS_MIXEDCOLLECTIVECOMMUNICATIONS_H
9 #define ARCGEOSIM_UTILS_MIXEDCOLLECTIVECOMMUNICATIONS_H
10 /* Author : havep at Mon Jul 25 16:55:54 2011
11  * Generated by createNew
12  */
13 
14 #include <arcane/IParallelMng.h>
15 
16 struct MixedCollective {
17 private:
18  template<bool Cond, typename DestT, typename SrcT>
19  static void copyCastIf(DestT * dest, const SrcT * src) { if (Cond) *dest = static_cast<DestT>(*src); }
20 
21 public:
22  // Le type DataT est dimensionn� au cas max et wrapp� dans le pseudo constructeur Data pour son int�grit�
23  template<int N = 0, typename T0 = int, typename T1 = int, typename T2 = int, typename T3 = int, typename T4 = int, typename T5 = int, typename T6 = int>
24  class DataT
25  {
26  public:
27  DataT(T0 * t0 = 0, T1 * t1 = 0, T2 * t2 = 0, T3 * t3 = 0, T4 * t4 = 0, T5 * t5 = 0, T6 * t6 = 0)
28  : v0(t0) , v1(t1) , v2(t2) , v3(t3) , v4(t4) , v5(t5) , v6(t6) { }
29  public:
30  template<typename T> void serializeData(Array<T> & compacted_data)
31  {
32  compacted_data.resize(N);
33  copyCastIf<(N > 0), T, T0>(compacted_data.unguardedBasePointer()+0, v0);
34  copyCastIf<(N > 1), T, T1>(compacted_data.unguardedBasePointer()+1, v1);
35  copyCastIf<(N > 2), T, T2>(compacted_data.unguardedBasePointer()+2, v2);
36  copyCastIf<(N > 3), T, T3>(compacted_data.unguardedBasePointer()+3, v3);
37  copyCastIf<(N > 4), T, T4>(compacted_data.unguardedBasePointer()+4, v4);
38  copyCastIf<(N > 5), T, T5>(compacted_data.unguardedBasePointer()+5, v5);
39  copyCastIf<(N > 6), T, T6>(compacted_data.unguardedBasePointer()+6, v6);
40  }
41 
42  template<typename T> void deserializeData(Array<T> & compacted_data)
43  {
44  copyCastIf<(N > 0), T0, T>(v0, compacted_data.unguardedBasePointer()+0);
45  copyCastIf<(N > 1), T1, T>(v1, compacted_data.unguardedBasePointer()+1);
46  copyCastIf<(N > 2), T2, T>(v2, compacted_data.unguardedBasePointer()+2);
47  copyCastIf<(N > 3), T3, T>(v3, compacted_data.unguardedBasePointer()+3);
48  copyCastIf<(N > 4), T4, T>(v4, compacted_data.unguardedBasePointer()+4);
49  copyCastIf<(N > 5), T5, T>(v5, compacted_data.unguardedBasePointer()+5);
50  copyCastIf<(N > 6), T6, T>(v6, compacted_data.unguardedBasePointer()+6);
51  }
52  private:
53  T0 * v0;
54  T1 * v1;
55  T2 * v2;
56  T3 * v3;
57  T4 * v4;
58  T5 * v5;
59  T6 * v6;
60  };
61 
62  template<typename T0>
63  DataT<1,T0>
64  static Data(T0 & t0) { return DataT<1,T0>(&t0); }
65  template<typename T0, typename T1>
66  DataT<2,T0,T1>
67  static Data(T0 & t0, T1 & t1) { return DataT<2,T0,T1>(&t0,&t1); }
68  template<typename T0, typename T1, typename T2>
69  DataT<3,T0,T1,T2>
70  static Data(T0 & t0, T1 & t1, T2 & t2) { return DataT<3,T0,T1,T2>(&t0,&t1,&t2); }
71  template<typename T0, typename T1, typename T2, typename T3>
72  DataT<4,T0,T1,T2,T3>
73  static Data(T0 & t0, T1 & t1, T2 & t2, T3 & t3) { return DataT<4,T0,T1,T2,T3>(&t0,&t1,&t2,&t3); }
74  template<typename T0, typename T1, typename T2, typename T3, typename T4>
75  DataT<5,T0,T1,T2,T3,T4>
76  static Data(T0 & t0, T1 & t1, T2 & t2, T3 & t3, T4 & t4) { return DataT<5,T0,T1,T2,T3,T4>(&t0,&t1,&t2,&t3,&t4); }
77  template<typename T0, typename T1, typename T2, typename T3, typename T4, typename T5>
78  DataT<6,T0,T1,T2,T3,T4,T5>
79  static Data(T0 & t0, T1 & t1, T2 & t2, T3 & t3, T4 & t4, T5 & t5) { return DataT<6,T0,T1,T2,T3,T4,T5>(&t0,&t1,&t2,&t3,&t4,&t5); }
80  template<typename T0, typename T1, typename T2, typename T3, typename T4, typename T5, typename T6>
81  DataT<7,T0,T1,T2,T3,T4,T5,T6>
82  static Data(T0 & t0, T1 & t1, T2 & t2, T3 & t3, T4 & t4, T5 & t5, T6 & t6) { return DataT<7,T0,T1,T2,T3,T4,T5,T6>(&t0,&t1,&t2,&t3,&t4,&t5,&t6); }
83 
84 
85  template<typename MaxType>
86  struct Comm
87  {
88  template<typename MixedData>
89  static void broadcast(Arcane::IParallelMng * parallel_mng, const Integer master_id, MixedData v) {
90  SharedArray<MaxType> compacted_data;
91  v.serializeData(compacted_data);
92  parallel_mng->broadcast(compacted_data,master_id);
93  v.deserializeData(compacted_data);
94  }
95 
96  template<typename MixedData>
97  static void reduce(Arcane::IParallelMng * parallel_mng, Arcane::Parallel::eReduceType rt, MixedData v) {
98  SharedArray<MaxType> compacted_data;
99  v.serializeData(compacted_data);
100  parallel_mng->reduce(rt,compacted_data);
101  v.deserializeData(compacted_data);
102  }
103  };
104 };
105 
106 #endif /* ARCGEOSIM_UTILS_MIXEDCOLLECTIVECOMMUNICATIONS_H */
